en_title: Call of Duty Ambience Website Lets You Fall Asleep to Nostalgic Black Ops and MW2 Lobbies
cn_title: 《使命召唤》环境音网站重现经典多人大厅争吵声
subtitle: 吵着入睡
opus_summary: 应用开发者Mike Wing制作「Call of Duty Ambience」网站，以XBOX 360风格重现《现代战争2》《黑色行动》和《黑色行动2》的多人大厅，让用户伴着玩家争吵声入睡。

paragraphs.en: Have you ever wanted to fall asleep to the sound of Call of Duty players screaming through a $5 mic and into your ear? No? Well, Call of Duty Ambience is here anyway.
paragraphs.cn: 你是否曾想伴着《使命召唤》玩家用5美元(约合人民币34元)麦克风对着你耳朵大喊的声音入睡？没有？无论如何，「Call of Duty Ambience」网站还是来了。

paragraphs.en: Erected by app-maker Mike Wing, Call of Duty Ambience is a new website that, for some reason, allows you to tap back into multiplayer lobbies like it's 2010 all over again. Fit with an Xbox 360 theme, cringy gamertags, and other classic visuals, the site allows anyone to log in and get some shuteye while strangers argue in the background.
paragraphs.cn: 「Call of Duty Ambience」由应用开发者Mike Wing搭建。出于某种原因，这个新网站能让你重新进入多人大厅，仿佛又回到2010年。网站采用XBOX 360主题，配上令人尴尬的玩家ID和其他经典视觉元素，任何人都能登录，并在陌生人的争吵声中打个盹。

paragraphs.en: Three Call of Duty games are supported at the moment: Modern Warfare 2 , Black Ops , and Black Ops 2 . If you ever played a few games of team deathmatch for any of these first-person shooter classics, you should immediately feel right at home.
paragraphs.cn: 网站目前支持三款《使命召唤》游戏：《现代战争2》《黑色行动》和《黑色行动2》。如果你曾在这些经典第一人称射击游戏中打过几局团队死斗，应该马上就会找到回家的感觉。

paragraphs.en: most people fall asleep to white noise
paragraphs.cn: 大多数人听着白噪音入睡。

paragraphs.en: i fall asleep to grown men arguing in cod lobbies
paragraphs.cn: 我听着成年人在《使命召唤》大厅里争吵入睡。

paragraphs.en: so i made a website that plays Call of Duty voice chat 24/7 pic.twitter.com/tu0q1rxtFO
paragraphs.cn: 所以我做了一个24/7播放《使命召唤》语音聊天的网站。

paragraphs.en: "Most people fall asleep to white noise," Wing said in an X/Twitter post . "I fall asleep to grown men arguing in CoD lobbies. So I made a website that plays Call of Duty voice chat 24/7."
paragraphs.cn: Wing在X上发帖称：「大多数人听着白噪音入睡，我则听着成年人在《使命召唤》大厅里争吵入睡。所以我做了一个24/7播放《使命召唤》语音聊天的网站。」

paragraphs.en: Most old-school Call of Duty fans might remember "CoD lobbies" more than the games themselves. In the early days of multiplayer for the Infinity Ward and Treyarch titles, players would stick around between matches to chat amongst themselves. These almost always devolved into trash-talking shouting matches that would go on without any real rhyme or reason. It was terrible – but for some, it was peaceful in its own way, too.
paragraphs.cn: 许多老派《使命召唤》粉丝对「多人大厅」的记忆，或许比对游戏本身还深。在Infinity Ward和Treyarch作品的多人模式早期，玩家会在比赛间隙留在大厅聊天。这些交流几乎总会演变成毫无来由的垃圾话吼叫大战。体验很糟，但对某些人来说，也自有一种安宁。

paragraphs.en: CoD lobbies added a social element to the games that's largely been done away with in recent installments. The recently released Black Ops 1 and 2 ports for PS4 and PS5 helped bring back the glory days in their own way, but Call of Duty Ambience feels like an especially nostalgic – and loud – nod, too.
paragraphs.cn: 《使命召唤》大厅为游戏增添了社交元素，而近年的作品基本已经舍弃这一部分。最近推出的《黑色行动1》和《黑色行动2》PS4、PS5移植版以自己的方式带回昔日荣光，「Call of Duty Ambience」则是一次格外怀旧——也格外吵闹——的致敬。

paragraphs.en: For more, you can read about how Activision is combating exploits in its new ports . You can also learn about how crossplay works here .
paragraphs.cn: 如需了解更多，可以阅读动视如何打击新移植版中的漏洞利用，以及跨平台联机的运作方式。
